translations.### 2021 Pinkoi Tech Career Talk — 高效率工程: ### 2021 Pinkoi Tech Career Talk — Secrets of a High-Efficiency Engineering Team
translations.### 高效率工程團隊大解密\n\n: ### The Secret to a High-Efficiency Engineering Team
translations.#### App Team 團隊內互相協作關係\n\n: #### Collaboration Relationships Within the App Team
translations.#### App Team 與外部協作關係\n\n: #### App Team and External Collaboration Relationships
translations.#### 打包正式版的問題\n\n: #### Issues with Packaging the Official Release
translations.(右)是每天會在固定時間整理＆發送訊息到 Slack Channel，提醒隊友有: (On the right) is a message that is organized and sent to the Slack Channel at a fixed time every day, reminding teammates which PRs are waiting for review ([modeled after Pull Reminders' feature](https://pullreminders.com/){:target="_blank"}).
translations.(左)是 PR Review 完之後會自動打上 reviewer name La: (Left) After PR Review is completed, the reviewer's name label is automatically added, allowing us to quickly summarize the PR review status.
translations.***No Code/Low Code First*** *優先選擇現有工具串接: ***No Code/Low Code First*** *Prioritize integrating existing tools (as shown in this example). Only evaluate the cost of automation and actual savings if no existing tools are available.*
translations.***但要記得，我們不是在逃避或是盡可能減少溝通，優秀的工程師溝通能力也很重要。: ***But remember, we are not avoiding or minimizing communication as much as possible; excellent communication skills are also important for great engineers.***
translations.***但這個很容易亂掉，要動態的調整；不能涵蓋太多特例，也不能固守都不擴充。**: ***But this can easily get messy and needs to be adjusted dynamically; it shouldn't cover too many special cases, nor should it be rigidly fixed without expansion.***
translations.***尤其隨著團隊規模不斷成長，對工作效率的影響也隨之放大。***\n\n: ***Especially as the team size continues to grow, the impact on work efficiency also increases.***
translations.***早優化早享受，晚優化沒折扣！！***\n\n: ***The earlier you optimize, the sooner you enjoy; late optimization gets no discounts!!***
translations.**Pinkoi 的工作方式是由多個 Squad (小隊)組成：**\n\n: **Pinkoi's working method consists of multiple Squads:**
translations.**以上是 Pinkoi 高效率工程團隊大解密的分享，謝謝大家。**\n\n: **This concludes the sharing of Pinkoi's high-efficiency engineering team secrets. Thank you all.**
translations.**取得成功後，記得與團隊分享成果，以促成跨部門資源整合** (因為同個問題可能: **After achieving success, remember to share the results with the team to promote cross-departmental resource integration** (because the same issue may exist in multiple departments simultaneously)
translations.**如果錯過就要等下一班，** 各個 Squad 團隊跟專案自己選擇要上車的時間: **If you miss it, you have to wait for the next one,** each Squad team and project chooses their own boarding time.
translations.**更多 Release Train 的技術細節可參考：**\n\n: **For more technical details on Release Train, please refer to:**
translations.*Google Apps Script 若要直接在 Google Calenda: *If you want Google Apps Script to run automatically when a Google Calendar event starts, you currently need to run your own service. For a quick solution, you can use IFTTT as a bridge between Google Calendar and Bitrise/Google Apps Script. You can [refer to this article](https://gist.github.com/tanaikech/fbbfaa8f2a8a770424974aa16b9b6f3b){:target="_blank"} for the method.*
translations.*Slack Workflow 應用可參考此篇文章： [Slack 打造全自動: *For Slack Workflow applications, refer to this article: [Slack building a fully automated WFH employee health status reporting system](../d61062833c1a/)*
translations.*之前在 StreetVoice 只是純 MVC 但是是乾淨統一的，協作起來也很: *Previously at StreetVoice, it was pure MVC but clean and consistent, making collaboration smooth.*
translations.*但這邊要注意，iOS Firebase App Distribution 佔用: *Note that iOS Firebase App Distribution uses Development Devices, with a limit of only 100 devices registered, counted by device, not by user.*
translations.*在 Pinkoi 人人都可以是解決問題的領導者，不一定要是 Lead or P: *At Pinkoi, everyone can be a problem-solving leader; it doesn't have to be a Lead or PM to solve issues. Many of the communication interfaces, tools, or automation projects introduced earlier were discovered by teammates who proposed solutions, and everyone worked together to complete them.*
translations.*如果要做的進階可以開發 Slack Bot，能有更完整更客製化的流程、表單可用: *For more advanced needs, you can develop a Slack Bot to have more complete and customized workflows and forms available.*
translations.*所以可能要跟 TestFlight (by 人，外部測試 1,000 人) 的: *So it may be necessary to weigh the solution against TestFlight (by people, external testing with 1,000 users).*
translations.*文末還有 **關於 Pinkoi 的文化是如何支持隊友解決問題** ，如果 *: *At the end of the article, there is a section on **how Pinkoi's culture supports teammates in solving problems**. If you are **not interested in the practical actions taken, you can skip directly to this section at the bottom**.*
translations.*部署方式、教學及技術細節可參考：* [**ZReviewTender — 免費: *Deployment methods, tutorials, and technical details can be found at:* [**ZReviewTender — Free Open-Source App Reviews Monitoring Bot**](../e36e48bb9265/)
translations.- (Left) After PR Review is completed, t:
- (Left) After PR Review is completed, the reviewer's name label is automatically added, allowing us to quickly summarize the PR review status.

- (On the right) is a message that is organized and sent to the Slack Channel at a fixed time every day, reminding teammates which PRs are waiting for review ([modeled after Pull Reminders' feature](https://pullreminders.com/){:target="_blank"}).
translations.- Actively communicate across all aspect:
- Actively communicate across all aspects to gather feedback

- Maintain empathy (since some solutions might be the best option for the other party, careful consideration is needed)
translations.- Buyer-Squad: Focuses on buyer-side fea:
- Buyer-Squad: Focuses on buyer-side features

- Seller-Squad: Focuses on features for designers

- Exploring-Squad: Focuses on Browsing and Discovery

- Ad-Squad: Focuses on Platform Advertising

- Out-Of-Squad: Mainly focuses on support, infrastructure, or process optimization
translations.- Courageous Practice\n\n- Continuous Mo:
- Courageous Practice

- Continuous Monitoring and Dynamic Adjustment of Solutions

- **After success, remember to share the results with the team to promote cross-departmental resource integration** (because the same issue may exist in multiple departments simultaneously)
translations.- Good but strive for better. If you fin:
- Good but strive for better. If you find any issues, no matter how small, remember that as the team grows, even minor problems can have amplified effects.

- Investigate and summarize issues to avoid premature optimization (some problems may be only temporary).
translations.- Leverage Your Own Influence\n\n- Propo:
- Leverage Your Own Influence

- Propose a Problem-Solving Plan

- If it involves repetitive tasks, prioritize using automation solutions.

- Remember to maintain flexibility and scalability, avoiding over-engineering
translations.- Slack: Communication Software\n\n- Fas:
- Slack: Communication Software

- Fastlane: iOS Automation Scripting Tool

- Github: Git Provider

- Github Action: Github's CI/CD service, will be introduced later

- Firebase: Crashlytics, Event, App Distribution (introduced later), Remote Config…

- Google Apps Script: A scripting tool for Google Apps, which will be introduced later.

- Bitrise: CI/CD Server

- Onesky: As mentioned earlier, a third-party tool for Localization

- Testflight: iOS App Internal Testing Platform

- Google Calendar: Google Calendar, its usage will be introduced later

- Asana: Project Management Tool
translations.- Update the new version every Monday mo:
- Update the new version every Monday morning

- Code Freeze every Wednesday (no more merging of feature PRs)

- Fixed QA starts on Thursdays

- Fixed Friday Release Packaging
translations.1. Currently, the Pinkoi iOS Team uses t:
1. Currently, the Pinkoi iOS Team uses the Gitflow workflow.

2. In principle, this consensus must be followed by all teams, so we do not accept any requests that break this rule (e.g., special releases on Wednesdays). However, for projects involving external collaboration, flexibility should be maintained if necessary, as this consensus applies only within the team.

3. HotFixes for critical issues can be updated anytime and are not subject to the Release Train schedule.

For a quick solution, you can use IFTTT as a bridge between Google Calendar and Bitrise/Google Apps Script. translations.> > Mobile engineers, how often do you r: > > Mobile engineers, how often do you release your app? (How often do you have build cuts that then go to the app store)?
translations.> Mobile engineers, how often do you rel: > Mobile engineers, how often do you release your app? (How often do you have build cuts that then go to the app store)?
translations.App 與 Backend 彼此缺少的就是一個溝通介面，Solution 有很多: The missing piece between the App and Backend is a communication interface. There are many solutions, and it doesn't have to be a tool; it can simply be a manually maintained document.
translations.At Uber, we had a weekly build cut that: At Uber, we had a weekly build cut that kicked off the release process (dogfooding -> app store)
translations.Backend — API、Product Designer — UI 這不用講: Backend — API and Product Designer — UI go without saying. Since Pinkoi is an international product, all functional text needs to be translated by the Localization Team. Also, because we have a Data Team handling data collection and analysis, besides developing features, we need to discuss event tracking points with the Data Team.
translations.Customer Service 也是會經常與我們有互動關係的 Team，除了使: Customer Service is also a team that frequently interacts with us. Besides users sometimes directly reporting order issues through store reviews, more often users leave a one-star rating indicating a problem. At this time, we need the customer service team to help with in-depth inquiries: What issue did you encounter? How can we assist you?
translations.Exploring-Squad：主攻瀏覽探索\n: Exploring-Squad: Focused on Browsing and Discovery
translations.Firebase：Crashlytics、Event、App Distribut: Firebase: Crashlytics, Event, App Distribution (introduced later), Remote Config…
translations.Gathering this data to be included in Mo: Gathering this data to be included in Mobile Apps at Scale.
translations.Github Action 只要是 Github 託管的 Git 專案都能使用，: Github Actions can be used with any Git project hosted on Github. Public repos have no limits, while private repos get 2,000 free minutes per month.
translations.Github Action 是 Github 的 CI/CD 服務，可以直接與: Github Action is Github's CI/CD service that can be directly linked to Github events. Trigger timings include opening an issue, opening a PR, merging a PR, and more.
translations.Github Action 還有很多可以做的自動化項目，大家可以發揮想像。\n\: There are many more automation tasks that can be done with Github Actions. Feel free to use your imagination.
translations.Github Action：Github 的 CI/CD 服務，後面會介紹\n: Github Action: Github's CI/CD service, will be introduced later
translations.Google Apps Script：Google Apps 的外掛腳本程式，後: Google Apps Script: A scripting tool for Google Apps, which will be introduced later.
translations.Google Calendar：Google 行事曆，後面會介紹用在哪\n: Google Calendar: Google Calendar, its usage will be introduced later
translations.HotFix 嚴重問題，是隨時可更新的，不受 Release Train 規範。: HotFix for critical issues can be updated anytime and is not subject to the Release Train schedule.
translations.Mobile engineers, how often do you relea: Mobile engineers, how often do you release your app? (How often do you have build cuts that then go to the app store)?
translations.Onesky：前面有說到，Localization 的第三方工具\n: Onesky: As mentioned earlier, a third-party tool for Localization
translations.Out-Of-Squad：主要做支援、Infra 或 流程優化\n: Out-Of-Squad: Mainly focused on support, infrastructure, or process optimization
translations.Pinkoi 使用的是 Python (FastAPI) 從 API Code: Pinkoi uses Python (FastAPI) to automatically generate documentation from API code. PHP can use Swagger (previous company practice). The advantage is that the main structure and data formats of the documentation can be generated automatically from the code, reducing maintenance costs. You only need to handle the field descriptions properly.
translations.Pinkoi 高效率工程團隊大解密 Tech Talk 分享\n\n: Pinkoi High-Efficiency Engineering Team Revealed Tech Talk Sharing
translations.Recap 介面意義，團隊內的介面是用來增加彼此的共識，團隊外的協作是降低彼此的: Recap: The meaning of interfaces—within the team, interfaces are used to build mutual understanding; in cross-team collaboration, they reduce ineffective communication. Using interfaces as communication boundaries helps focus discussions on requirements.
translations.Recap 自動化打包正式版的成效，一樣直接使用現有工具串接；除了 **自動化之: Recap of the automated official build packaging results: we directly used existing tools for integration; besides **automation, we also added fixed processes to double work efficiency**.
translations.Recap 釋出測試版自動化的成效，最有感的是把整個步驟都搬到雲端上執行，App: Recap of the automated beta release results: the most noticeable improvement is moving the entire process to the cloud. The App Team no longer needs to intervene; it’s fully self-service.
translations.Recap 高效率工作團隊的內幕，我們主要做了什麼事。\n\n: Recap What We Mainly Did to Build a High-Performance Team.
translations.Release Train 顧名思義就像火車站一樣，每個版本都是一班列車\n\n: As the name suggests, a Release Train is like a train station, where each release is a train.
translations.Seller-Squad ：主攻設計師端功能\n: Seller-Squad: Focuses on features for designers
translations.Solution 最基本的就是要先請設計大大整理好 UI 的元件庫、建立好 De: The most basic solution is to first have the designers organize the UI component library, establish the Design System (Guideline), and properly label the UI during delivery.
translations.Testflight：iOS App 內測平台\n: Testflight: iOS App Internal Testing Platform
translations.[這塊 2020 Pinkoi 開發者之夜有跟大家分享過 — by Toki](: [This was shared with everyone at the 2020 Pinkoi Developer Night — by Toki](https://www.yourator.co/articles/171#Toki){:target="_blank"}
translations.p.s Pinkoi 因很早期就有這流程，當時選用的是 Onesky 不過這幾年: p.s Pinkoi adopted this process very early on and initially used Onesky, but in recent years, there are many better tools available that you can consider using.
translations.p.s. RFC 的目的是提升工作效率，所以不應該太冗長，甚至嚴重拖累工作進度；: p.s. The purpose of an RFC is to improve work efficiency, so it should not be too lengthy or seriously delay progress; think of it simply as a pre-work discussion.
translations.p.s. 在 Pinkoi 與 Product Designer 的協作是互相的: p.s. Collaboration between Pinkoi and Product Designers is mutual; Developers can also propose better approaches and discuss them with Product Designers.
translations.p.s. 目前新的 Python 3 都會使用 FastAPI，舊的部分會逐步更: p.s. Currently, new Python 3 projects use FastAPI. The older parts will be updated gradually. For now, PostMan is used as the communication interface.
translations.「我以為你以為的我以為的以為」 — 這句話完美詮釋了模糊溝通的後果。\n\n: "I thought you thought I thought you thought" — This sentence perfectly illustrates the consequences of vague communication.
translations.不會提到技術實作細節，單講原理上的可行性。\n\n: Will not mention technical implementation details, only the feasibility in principle.
translations.不要說工作了，日常生活上我們也很常會遇到因為雙方認知不同導致的誤會，生活上輕鬆自: Let's not just talk about work; in daily life, we often face misunderstandings due to different perceptions. In life, ease comes from mutual understanding; but at work, it's different. If both sides don’t discuss deeply, differing perceptions can lead to results that are completely unlike what was expected.
translations.主要是 Review 這些，其次才是功能正不正常…之類的協助。\n\n: Mainly reviewing these, and secondly assisting with whether the features work properly or not.
translations.人少，溝通跟處理事情都很快，走過去討論好，等下就可以馬上給你了；因為「人與人的連: With fewer people, communication and handling tasks are very fast. You can just walk over to discuss, and they can give it to you right away; because the "connection between people" is very strong, everyone can collaborate in sync.
translations.人數規模成長跟工作效率的關係，待過 10 個人的新創到百人的團隊（還沒挑戰過千人: The relationship between team size growth and work efficiency: Having experienced startups from 10 people to teams of 100 (not yet at the thousand mark), the jump from 10 to 100—a tenfold increase—is very noticeable in many aspects.
translations.人數規模成長，以 App Team 為例，會有比較密切協作的有這些職務。\n\n: As the team size grows, taking the App Team as an example, the roles that collaborate more closely include these.
translations.以下以 App Team 協作為例舉 4 個介面溝通的例子：\n\n: Here are four examples of interface communication using the App Team collaboration as an example:
translations.以每週更新 & 我們多團隊為例，就會如上圖。\n\n: Using weekly updates & our multiple teams as examples, it would look like the image above.
translations.但團隊大，同時有多線的需求在開發跟迭代，就會遇到如上圖的狀況，沒有做好前文說的「: However, when the team is large and multiple demands are being developed and iterated simultaneously, the situation shown above occurs. Without proper "interface communication" as mentioned earlier, everyone works independently. This causes the App Team to be overwhelmed because app updates are more costly and complex than web updates. On the other hand, frequent and chaotic updates also disrupt the user experience.
translations.但在互相協作的隊友越來越多的情況下，大家都在同個專案底下做事，如果還是各做各的將: However, as more teammates collaborate together, and everyone works under the same project, it would be disastrous if everyone just works independently.
translations.但在人多的情況，很難這樣直接溝通，因為一起協作的人變多了，每個都走去講一整個上午: However, when there are many people, direct communication becomes difficult because more collaborators are involved. If everyone tries to discuss everything, the whole morning will be gone. Also, since everyone collaborates with many others, tasks must be prioritized. Non-urgent matters cannot be addressed immediately, so asynchronous waiting is necessary to focus on other tasks.
translations.但如同開頭說的，相對的；會有更多與人的協作，協作相對的就是會有更多溝通時間。\n: But as mentioned at the beginning, there will be more collaboration with people, and collaboration naturally means more communication time.
translations.但至少前面的 Slack WorkFlow UI Input 是可以考慮採用的。: But at least the Slack Workflow UI Input mentioned earlier can be considered for use.
translations.使用 Google Calendar 串接還有個好處，如果遇到突發狀況需要延後、: Another benefit of integrating with Google Calendar is that if unexpected situations arise requiring you to postpone or move up an event, you can simply go in and change the date directly.
translations.使用這個「介面」作為彼此溝通的橋樑，介面可以有多個，什麼場景就用什麼介面；遇到相: Use this "interface" as a communication bridge between each other. There can be multiple interfaces, and you use the appropriate one for each scenario. For the same scenario, prioritize using this interface for initial communication. If further discussion is needed, you can dive deeper based on this interface to focus on the issues.
translations.例如打 API 一下這邊這樣做一下那邊那樣做、很常重造輪子浪費時間或什麼都不 C: For example, frequently calling APIs here and there, doing this and that, often reinventing the wheel and wasting time, or just carelessly pushing things online without any consideration—all of these will greatly increase future maintenance and scalability costs.
translations.保持換位思考(因為有的問題可能是對方的最佳解，要做好權衡)\n: Maintain empathy (since some solutions might be the best option for the other party, careful consideration is needed)
translations.像是在開源專案常看到的 issue bot：\n\n: Like the issue bots commonly seen in open source projects:
translations.像是打包正式版，傳統手動方式費時費力，從打包、上傳、送審整個流程大概要花 1 個: For example, packaging the official release manually is time-consuming and labor-intensive. The entire process—from packaging, uploading, to submitting for review—takes about an hour. During this time, you have to keep switching your work mode, making it hard to do other tasks. This process is repeated every time you package, which wastes work efficiency.
translations.再次重申「介面溝通」不是什麼特別的專有名詞或是工具、工程的東西，他只是個概念，適: To reiterate, "interface communication" is not a special term, tool, or engineering concept. It is simply a concept applicable to collaboration in any role or scenario. It can be just a document or a process. The key is to have this in place first before starting communication.
translations.剛說的是外部，現在來說內部。\n\n: What was just mentioned is about external matters; now let's talk about internal ones.
translations.原則上這個共識是所有團隊都要遵守，所以不希望有需求是打破這個規則的 (EX: 特: In principle, this consensus must be followed by all teams, so we do not want any requests that break this rule (e.g., special releases on Wednesdays). However, for projects involving external collaboration, flexibility must be maintained if necessary, since this consensus applies only within the team.
translations.原本浪費的工作時間，節省起來後可以投入其他更有價值的事，所以實際換成產能應該還要: The originally wasted work time, once saved, can be invested in other more valuable tasks, so the actual productivity gain should be multiplied by 200%.
translations.原本除了手動打包時間，其實還有額外溝通上版時間的成本，現在直接歸 0；只要確保在: Originally, besides the manual packaging time, there was additional communication time cost for releasing. Now it’s reduced to zero; as long as the release is **on schedule**, all the time can be focused on "discussion" and "development."
translations.另一個方法是使用 TestFlight 作為測試版發布媒介，我覺得也不錯；但有兩: Another method is using TestFlight as the beta release channel, which I think is also good; however, there are two issues. First, TestFlight is equivalent to the Production environment, not Debug. Second, when many teammates are testing different features simultaneously, TestFlight can become chaotic, and the build versions will change frequently, but it's still manageable.
translations.問題如上。\n\n:
# How Pinkoi's Engineering Team Builds Efficiency

Pinkoi is a marketplace for design goods with over 3 million members, 30,000 shops, and 1 million products. Our engineering team has grown from a small group to over 70 members across multiple squads and departments. We constantly seek ways to improve efficiency and collaboration.

## Team Structure and Collaboration

Our engineering team is organized into several cross-functional squads. Each squad owns long-term goals and works closely with Product Designers, Backend, QA, and other teams. For short-term projects, squads collaborate across teams to deliver features quickly.

As the team grows, communication cost increases. To address this, we define clear "interfaces" — documents, processes, tools — that act as bridges between teams. This avoids ambiguous communication and repeated confirmations, speeding up collaboration.

## Example: App Team Interfaces

The App Team collaborates with Backend, Product Design, Customer Support, and Localization teams. We establish clear communication interfaces such as API documentation, design specs, and localization guidelines. Inside the team, we maintain shared agreements on coding style, architecture, and code review practices.

## Automating Repetitive Tasks

We automate repetitive workflows like beta releases and official app packaging. Using tools like Slack Workflow, Bitrise, Fastlane, and Google Apps Script, combined with fixed processes like Release Train, we save time and reduce context switching.

## Culture and Mindset

Pinkoi encourages every member to be a problem-solving leader. Our core values support continuous improvement and cross-department collaboration. This mindset, together with clear interfaces and automation, greatly boosts team productivity, especially as the team scales.
translations.因為要時不時人工上去看一下新評價，如過有客服問題再將問題轉發給客服協助處理，很重: Because we need to manually check new reviews from time to time, and forward any customer service issues to the support team for assistance, the process is repetitive and manual.
translations.固定週一早上更新新版\n: Update the new version every Monday morning
translations.固定週三 Code Freeze (不再 Merge Feature PR)\n: Code Freeze every Wednesday (no more merging of feature PRs)
translations.團隊內與其說是介面，我覺得太見外了；應該要說共識、共鳴更有團隊意識感。\n\n: Within the team, rather than calling it an interface, it feels too distant; it should be called consensus or resonance to foster a stronger sense of team spirit.
translations.團隊小的時候，只有單線開發，App 版本更新問題不大，可以很自由也可以很規律。\: When the team was small, development was linear, and app version updates were not a big issue. It could be done freely or regularly.
translations.在 Pinkoi 人人都可以是解決問題的領導者\n\n: At Pinkoi, Everyone Can Be a Problem-Solving Leader
translations.在 Pinkoi 的解法是，首先將「由 App Team 來安裝測試版」這件事拆: Pinkoi's solution is to first break down the task of "App Team installing the test version" by using Slack Workflow as the input UI. After input is completed, it triggers Bitrise to run a Fastlane script to package and upload the test version ipa to Firebase App Distribution.
translations.在人少或是說一個開發者維護一個專案的時候；你想做什麼就做什麼，你對專案的掌握度、: When there are few people, or when a single developer maintains a project, you can do whatever you want. Your control and understanding of the project are very high, so there’s not much problem. Of course, if you have good sense, even a one-person project can achieve everything mentioned here.
translations.套版的時候統一使用這些已建立好的元件來套版，方便我們直接看 UI 設計稿就能快速: When templating, consistently use these pre-built components to make it easier to quickly align by directly referring to the UI design drafts.
translations.好還要更好，如果有發現問題，不管是大小，前面有說到隨團隊規模成長，小問題也會有放: Good but strive for better. If you find any issues, no matter how small, remember that as the team grows, even minor problems can have amplified effects.
translations.如果跟重複工作有關則優先使用自動化方案\n: If it involves repetitive tasks, prioritize using automation solutions.
translations.實際時程(QA 多久)、發版週期(每週、每兩週、每個月)依照各公司狀況可自行調整: Actual timelines (how long QA takes) and release cycles (weekly, biweekly, monthly) can be adjusted based on each company's situation. **The core is to decide what to do at fixed times.**
translations.對於 API 怎麼用，如果單純地將 API Response String 給: Regarding how to use the API, simply providing the API Response String to the App Team can lead to ambiguities. For example, with `date`, how do we know if it refers to Register Date or Birthday? There are many fields with a wide range that require clarification.
translations.對於問題的解決，事情的改變；絕大多數都需要很多很多團隊一起努力才有可能更好，這部: For solving problems and making changes, most of the time it requires the effort of many teams working together to improve. This is where company culture support and encouragement are crucial; otherwise, pushing forward alone can be very tough.
translations.尤其疫情時代，溝通時間寶貴，要放在更有價值的討論上。\n\n: Especially during the pandemic era, communication time is precious and should be spent on more valuable discussions.
translations.心流切換成本 (3,600) + 溝通介面不好的情況下多餘的溝通 (1,200): Flow switching cost (3,600) + extra communication due to poor interfaces (1,200) + repetitive tasks solved by automation (216) = over 5,016 hours lost in a year.
translations.我們在 Code Base 上根據 Design System (Guideli: We build corresponding Fonts and Colors in the Code Base according to the Design System (Guideline), and create Buttons and Views based on the component library.
translations.我們將日程固定下來，每個階段會做什麼事也定下來：\n\n: We fixed the schedule and defined what tasks will be done at each stage:
translations.我們要做的事是聚焦在重要的溝通上，如創意發想、需求內容跟時程的討論；不要浪費時間: What we need to focus on is important communication, such as brainstorming, discussing requirements, and scheduling; avoid wasting time on repeated confirmations or vague, scattered communication, including asking around unnecessarily.
translations.或自動關閉太久沒 Merge 的 pr 都能用 Github Action 來自: Automatically closing PRs that have not been merged for a long time can also be done using GitHub Actions.
translations.所有翻譯、Key 都由第三方工具管理，我們只要事先定好 Key 就能分頭行動，雙: All translations and keys are managed by a third-party tool. We only need to define the keys in advance to work independently. Both sides just need to complete their tasks before the deadline without relying on each other. After the Localization Team finishes the translations, the tool automatically triggers a git pull to update the latest text files in the project.
translations.找出問題後就能定義出「介面」，介面就是媒介的意思，可以是一份問件、流程、chec: Once the problem is identified, the "interface" can be defined. An interface means a medium, which can be a document, process, checklist, tool, etc.
translations.持續追蹤、動態調整解決方案\n: Continuous Monitoring and Dynamic Adjustment of Solutions
translations.整理一下我們有用到的服務，包括但不限於：\n\n: Here is a list of the services we use, including but not limited to:
translations.既然我們已經固定日程了，這邊直接引入 Google Calendar，將預計日程: Since we have fixed the schedule, we directly integrate Google Calendar to add the planned tasks to the calendar. When the time comes, Google Apps Script will call Bitrise to run the Fastlane scripts for packaging the official version and submitting for review, completing all the work.
translations.更多職務的人加入，可以讓工作分工更細緻專業、提供更多產能或更好的品質、更快的產出: Having more roles join allows for finer and more specialized division of work, providing greater capacity, better quality, and faster output.
translations.最基本的老生常談就是 Coding Style，命名的習慣、位置怎麼放、Dele: The most basic and common topic is Coding Style, such as naming conventions, file placement, how to use Delegates, etc. You can enforce these using industry-standard tools like [realm](https://github.com/realm){:target="_blank"} / [SwiftLint](https://github.com/realm/SwiftLint){:target="_blank"}. For multilingual strings, you can organize them with [freshOS](https://github.com/freshOS){:target="_blank"} / [Localize](https://github.com/freshOS/Localize){:target="_blank"}. (Of course, if you already use a unified third-party tool as mentioned earlier, this might not be necessary.)
translations.最後一個例子，是與 Localization Team 的工作依賴；不管是新功能: The last example is the dependency on the Localization Team; whether it's a new feature or modifying existing translations, we need to wait for the Localization Team to complete their work before we can assist with the follow-up.
translations.最後一個是使用 Github Action 提升協作效率 (PR Review): The last one is using Github Action to improve collaboration efficiency (PR Review).
translations.最後就是文件的部分，關於團隊做事的流程、規格或操作手冊，方便隊友忘記的時候快速翻: Finally, regarding documentation, it covers the team's workflows, specifications, or operation manuals, making it easy for teammates to quickly reference when they forget something or for new members to get up to speed quickly.
translations.最後是管理問題，如果沒有固定的流程、日期，很難去對每個步驟該做什麼事進行優化。\: Finally, regarding management issues, without fixed processes and dates, it is difficult to optimize what needs to be done at each step.
translations.有以上那麼多的協作關係，意味著很多溝通機會。\n\n: With so many collaboration relationships, it means many communication opportunities.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.每個 Squad 會由各 Function 隊友共同組成，有 PM、Produc: Each Squad is composed of members from different functions, including PM, Product Designer, Data, Frontend, Backend, iOS, Android, and more. Long-term, ongoing work goals are completed by the Squad.
translations.流程、日程確定後，我們就可以對每個階段做的事進行優化。\n\n: Once the process and schedule are confirmed, we can optimize the tasks for each stage.
translations.目前 Pinkoi iOS Team 是採用 Gitflow 工作流程。\n: Currently, the Pinkoi iOS Team uses the Gitflow workflow.
translations.積極的溝通各面向蒐集建議\n: Actively communicate across all aspects to gather feedback
translations.第一個是與 Backend 協作在沒有任何介面共識前可能會有上圖情況。\n\n: The first case is collaborating with Backend without any interface consensus, which may lead to the situation shown above.
translations.第一個要說的重複性問題，是當我們 App 在開發階段想要給其他隊友搶先測試的時候: The first repetitive issue is when we want to let teammates test the app early during development. Traditionally, we just borrow phones to build the app. This is fine for 1-2 people, but if 20-30 people need to test, just installing the test version can take the whole day, and if there’s an update, the entire process has to be repeated.
translations.第一是在需求實作前有一個 Request for comments 的階段，負責: The first step is a Request for Comments phase before implementing the requirement. The developer briefly explains how they plan to approach the task, and others can provide feedback and ideas.
translations.第一步是找出什麼地方是模糊的、每次都要重複確認的溝通，或是需要什麼溝通才能更聚焦: The first step is to identify where communication is unclear, requires repeated confirmation, or what kind of communication is needed to be more focused and effective, or even what deliverables can eliminate the need for extra communication.
translations.第三個是和 Customer Service 的介面，商城的評價對產品很重要但他: The third interface is with Customer Service. Store reviews are very important for the product, but this process involves a lot of manual and repetitive referral communication.
translations.第二個也是 App Team 很常要做的事，打包、送審正式版 App。\n\n: The second task, which the App Team often handles, is packaging and submitting the official app version for review.
translations.第二個是 App 架構，不管是 MVC/MVVM/VIPER/Clean Arc: The second is the App architecture. Whether it's MVC, MVVM, VIPER, or Clean Architecture, the core focus is on being clean and consistent; there's no need to chase trends, consistency is what matters.
translations.第二個是與 Product Designer 的協作，其實道理上與 Backen: The second is collaboration with the Product Designer, which is basically similar to working with Backend, but the focus shifts to confirming UI specs and verifying flows.
translations.第二是做好 Code Review，把關我們的介面共識有沒有落實，例如：Nami:
Second, conduct thorough Code Reviews to ensure our interface agreements are followed, such as naming conventions, UI layout methods, delegate usage, protocol/class declarations, and so on.  
Also, check if the architecture is misused or if code is hastily written due to time pressure. For example, if the development direction is to fully adopt Swift, verify that no Objective-C code is still being submitted.
translations.第二章節想要跟大家分享一下關於自動化重複工作對於提升工作效率的效果，一樣會以 i: In the second chapter, I want to share the impact of automating repetitive tasks on improving work efficiency. I will use iOS as an example, but the same approach applies to Android.
translations.統整一下團隊內介面共識的功能，最後提到一個 **墜機理論** 的 Mindset: To summarize the functions of interface consensus within the team, the article finally mentions a **Crash Theory** mindset, which I think is a good behavioral benchmark.
translations.總計算一下這兩個自動化帶來的成效，一年可節省 216 工作時數。\n\n: In total, these two automations save 216 work hours per year.
translations.自動化加上前面提到的溝通介面，我們來看一下做這些事總共能提升多少效率。\n\n: With automation combined with the communication interfaces mentioned earlier, let's see how much efficiency can be improved by doing these tasks.
translations.色碼、字型如果零散，我們 App 也會很痛苦，撇開需求本來就是這樣，我們不想要有: If color codes and fonts are scattered, our App will suffer as well. Setting aside the fact that requirements are inherently like this, we don't want the same Title to have the same color but different color codes, or inconsistent UI in the same position.
translations.被無謂的事打斷的心流切換成本也應該列入計算，這邊抓 30 分鐘每次，一個月發生: The cost of flow switching caused by unnecessary interruptions should also be considered. Here, we estimate 30 minutes each time, occurring 10 times a month. For 60 people, this wastes an extra 3,600 hours per year.
translations.要測試的隊友，只要照著 Firebase App Distribution 的步: Testers just need to follow the Firebase App Distribution steps to install the certificate and register their device. Then they can choose to install the desired test build from there or directly click the link in the email to install.
translations.解決辦法是導入 Release Train 到開發流程中，核心概念是把版本更新跟: The solution is to introduce a Release Train into the development process. The core concept is to separate version updates from project development.
translations.記得保持彈性跟可擴充性，避免 Over Engineering\n: Remember to maintain flexibility and scalability, avoiding over-engineering
translations.調查、歸納問題，避免過早優化(有的問題可能只是暫時過渡而已)\n: Investigate and summarize issues to avoid premature optimization (some problems may be only temporary).
translations.這個最佳解就是讓商城評價能自動同步到我們的工作平台，可以花 $ 買現有的服務，或: The best solution is to have store reviews automatically synced to our work platform. We can either pay for an existing service or use the tools I developed: [ZhgChgLi](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi){:target="_blank"} / [ZReviewTender](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZReviewTender){:target="_blank"} (new in 2022).
translations.這個機器人就是我們的溝通介面，他會將評價自動轉發到 Slack Channel，: This bot is our communication interface. It automatically forwards reviews to the Slack Channel, allowing everyone to quickly receive the latest review information and track, communicate, and discuss on it.
translations.這個溝通也是重複的，每次有新的 Endpoint 都要再確認一次。\n\n: This communication is also repetitive, as each new Endpoint requires reconfirmation.
translations.這個自行開發工具的成本太高，所以直接使用第三方服務來協助我們解除依賴關係。\n\: The cost of developing this tool in-house is too high, so we directly use third-party services to help us eliminate dependencies.
translations.這就是很經典的無效溝通案例。\n\n: This is a classic example of ineffective communication.
translations.這是一個很好的溝通介面，大家只要有共識並遵守規定就能有條不紊的更新版本。\n\n: This is a great communication interface; as long as everyone agrees and follows the rules, version updates can proceed smoothly and orderly.
translations.這是國外推友發的版更週期調查，大多是 2 週一次。\n\n: This is a release cycle survey posted by a foreign Twitter user; most are every two weeks.
translations.這邊假設每次多花的溝通時間是 10 分，團隊 60 人，每個月發生 10 次，一: Here we assume each extra communication takes 10 minutes, with a team of 60 people, occurring 10 times per month. This wastes 1,200 hours per year on unnecessary communication.
translations.這邊多提了 Google App Scripts 的應用，詳情可參考： [運用: Here we additionally mention the use of Google Apps Scripts. For details, please refer to: [運用 Google Apps Script 轉發 Gmail 信件到 Slack](../d414bdbdb8c9/) .
translations.這邊引入的想法是透過一個共識的介面來做溝通，就類似我們工程物件導向程式設計中，: The idea introduced here is to communicate through a shared interface, similar to the Dependency Inversion Principle in SOLID principles of object-oriented programming (it's okay if you're not familiar with it); the same concept can be applied to communication.
translations.運用在團隊上就是假設今天所有人都突然消失了，現存的 Code、流程、制度能不能讓: Applied to the team, it means assuming everyone suddenly disappears today—can the existing code, processes, and systems enable new members to quickly get up to speed?
translations.還有 UnitTest，人多很難避免你現在做的邏輯哪一天不小心被改壞；有多寫測試: There are also Unit Tests. With many people involved, it's hard to avoid accidentally breaking the logic you wrote. Writing more tests provides an extra layer of protection.
translations.還有小問題會被加倍放大，例如本來 1 個人每天都需要花 10 分鐘貼報表，可以接: Small issues can be magnified, for example, if one person needs 10 minutes daily to submit reports, it’s acceptable; but if there are 20 people, that adds up to over 3 extra hours daily. At this point, optimizing or automating the reporting process becomes very valuable, saving 3 hours a day. Over 250 workdays a year, that’s 750 hours wasted.
translations.關於團隊文化是如何支持推動改變的，解決問題的四個階段都可以連結到 Pinkoi: Regarding how team culture supports driving change, the four stages of problem-solving all connect to Pinkoi's Core Values.
translations.除了 Code Level 的介面之外，協作上還有其他介面協助我們提高效率。\n: Besides code-level interfaces, there are other interfaces that help us improve collaboration efficiency.
translations.除了 Squad 之外也會有些跨團隊 Run 的 Project，多半時中短期的: Besides Squads, there are also cross-team Run Projects, usually with short to mid-term goals. The Project Owner can be the initiator or any team member, and the project is closed upon completion.
translations.除了剛做的項目，我們還需要多評估 [**心流切換成本**](https://zh: Besides the current project, we also need to evaluate the [**cost of flow switching**](https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E5%BF%83%E6%B5%81%E7%90%86%E8%AB%96){:target="_blank"}. After working continuously for a period, we enter a "flow" state where our thoughts and productivity peak, enabling the most effective output. However, if interrupted by unnecessary tasks (e.g., redundant communication, repetitive work), it takes time to return to flow. Here, we use 30 minutes as an example.
translations.除了可以防止重造輪子之外，還可以集思廣益，例如之後其他人要擴充別人要怎麼用、或日: Besides preventing reinventing the wheel, it also encourages brainstorming. For example, others can understand how to extend or use it later, or potential future needs can be considered... Sometimes insiders are too close to see clearly, while outsiders have a better perspective.
